name: Bernoulli's Equation
formula: P_1 + \frac{1}{2}\rho v_1^2 + \rho g h_1 = P_2 + \frac{1}{2}\rho v_2^2 + \rho g h_2

name: Endurance Limit (Fatigue)
formula: S_e = k_a k_b k_c k_d k_e S_e'
compute_logic: inputs.k_a * inputs.k_b * inputs.k_c * inputs.k_d * inputs.k_e * inputs.S_e_prime

name: Kirchhoff's Voltage Law (KVL)

variables.V: Voltage drops and rises around the loop (V)

compute_logic: 'Sum of V = 0 loop. Cannot evaluate symbolically.'

name: Kirchhoff's Current Law (KCL)
compute_logic: 'Sum of I_in = Sum of I_out. Cannot evaluate symbolically.'

variables.\\phi: Phase angle between V and I

variables.d\\Phi/dt: Rate of change of magnetic flux (Wb/s)

variables.y_{max}: Distance from neutral axis to extreme fibre (m)

name: Pavement CBR & Thickness (AASHTO simplified)
compute_logic: inputs.a_1 * inputs.D_1 + inputs.a_2 * inputs.D_2 * inputs.m_2 + inputs.a_3 * inputs.D_3 * inputs.m_3

name: Slope-Deflection Equation
compute_logic: (2 * inputs.E * inputs.I / inputs.L) * (2 * inputs.theta_A + inputs.theta_B - 3 * inputs.psi) + inputs.FEM_AB

name: Pile Capacity (Static Formula)
formula: Q_u = Q_s + Q_p = f_s A_s + q_p A_p

name: PFR Design Equation
compute_logic: 'PFR Volume Integral. Requires rate expression integration.'

name: Ergun Equation (Packed Bed)
compute_logic: (150 * inputs.mu * inputs.u * Math.pow(1 - inputs.epsilon, 2)) / (Math.pow(inputs.d_p, 2) * Math.pow(inputs.epsilon, 3)) + (1.75 * inputs.rho * Math.pow(inputs.u, 2) * (1 - inputs.epsilon)) / (inputs.d_p * Math.pow(inputs.epsilon, 3))

variables.x_A: Mole fraction of A in liquid

variables.N_A: Moles of A at time t (mol)

name: Yield & Selectivity
formula: S = \frac{\text{moles of desired product formed}}{\text{moles of limiting reactant consumed}}

name: Peng-Robinson EOS
compute_logic: (8.314 * inputs.T) / (inputs.V_m - inputs.b) - inputs.a / (inputs.V_m * (inputs.V_m + inputs.b) + inputs.b * (inputs.V_m - inputs.b))

name: Relief Valve Sizing (API 520)
compute_logic: inputs.W / (inputs.C * inputs.K_d * inputs.P_1 * inputs.K_b) * Math.sqrt(inputs.T * inputs.Z / inputs.M)

variables.f, g: Functions where lim gives 0/0 or ∞/∞ form

variables.n: Number of bins = number of balls

name: Quick Sort Average Complexity
formula: T(n) = O(n \log n) \text{ avg},\; O(n^2) \text{ worst}

name: Internal Rate of Return (IRR)
compute_logic: 'IRR summation polynomial root finding. Numerical method required.'

name: Profitability Index
formula: PI = \frac{PV \text{ of future cash flows}}{\text{Initial Investment}}

variables.Reserve Ratio: Fraction of deposits held as reserves (0–1)

variables.BV_{t-1}: Book value at start of year t ($)

name: MARR — Minimum Attractive Rate of Return

variables.MARR: Minimum acceptable return set by firm
